name: Bananas and Apples in Caramel Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the apples into wedges.
2. In a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, melt the butter in hot butter.
3. Cook the apple wedges for 5 minutes, stirring often.
4. Push the apple wedges to one side of the skillet.
5. Stir in the brown sugar and cook over low heat until melted, stirring frequently.
6. Gradually stir in the water.
7. Cut the bananas into 2-inch diagonal pieces.
8. Add the banana slices and pecans to the skillet.
9. Cook for 3 minutes over medium heat or until the bananas are heated through.
10. Gently turn the fruit occasionally.
11. Serve warm.
